tasks.resume_condition: GitHub Actions run-level outcome/log access or operator-supplied run URL/screenshot.

tasks.skip_reason: Paid OpenAI API (OPENAI_API_KEY) permanently prohibited by operator. P4 tested live LLM fallback via OpenAI Responses API which is not authorized. All OpenAI API workflows disabled. This test is not applicable to the authorized architecture.
tasks.review_required: Do not treat this operator skip as permanent GPT provider-class deprecation. BEM950-T2 and BEM950-T4 must reclassify the policy and P4 semantics.

tasks.acceptance: RULE-004...010 positive and negative runtime enforcement evidence
independent audit of P0.5-P6; broad PASS only with no limitations
tasks.note: P7 must not be dispatched until BEM-950 T1-T4 and the post-T4 provider-reference scan have PASS receipts. P1 remains a limitation; broad PASS requires independent run-level evidence and must not be inferred from task status.

scope.required_replacement: Valid GitHub Actions archive stub: workflow_dispatch only, at least one job, and job-level if: false. Do not use on: [] or jobs: {}.

acceptance: Each original workflow path contains a GitHub Actions-valid no-op archive stub.
Receipt lists archive and stub git_blob SHA values with sha_type=git_blob.
No invalid on: [] / jobs: {} stub remains for either target.

scope.required_policy: Provider-neutral architecture: metered OpenAI API fallback is denied; GPT remains a provider class that may be reactivated through a verified subscription, OAuth, or interactive adapter.

acceptance: gpt_codex_cloud is DISABLED_BY_COST_POLICY, not permanently deprecated as a provider class.
paid_api_policy denies metered_api_default and automatic_paid_fallback while identifying allowed classes.
Receipt records before and after git_blob SHA values and status PASS.

required_fixes: Correct ValueEror to ValueError and use the intended path variable.
Accept SKIPPED_BY_OPERATOR only for the allowlisted BEM949-P4-LIVE-LLM-FALLBACK task.
scope.validation: Compile the exact updated Python source before persistence.

acceptance: The precise P4 allowlist is recorded as operator_skip_acknowledged in the receipt.
The operator skip is non-blocking for the allowed task only and is not interpreted as a broad release PASS.
Receipt has before/after git_blob SHAs, compile_verified=true, and status PASS.

scope.progress_rule: Do not change the BEM-949 progress percentage before P7 completes.

acceptance: P4 records a billing-class-specific prohibition rather than permanent GPT provider-class deprecation.
The queue policy states that subscription, OAuth, and interactive GPT adapter paths remain architecturally valid.
P7 remains blocked until T1-T4 and the provider-reference scan receipts are PASS.
Receipt records the updated queue git_blob SHA and status PASS.

scope.rule: Inventory active, non-archived workflow/config references. An unresolved metered-API reference requires a BLOCKED receipt and an operator gate.

acceptance: Receipt enumerates every finding with file and active/archive classification.
PASS is permitted only when active references conform to the billing-class policy.
No P7 dispatch occurs before this receipt is PASS.

paid_api_policy.scope_clarification: The prohibition covers billing_class=metered_api_default and automatic_paid_fallback only. GPT provider-class reactivation through a verified subscription, OAuth, or interactive adapter remains architecturally valid under BEM-950.

next_action: Execute BEM950-T1-INVALID-WORKFLOW-ARCHIVE. Do not dispatch P7 or run roadmap-autopilot for P7 until BEM-950 T1-T4 and BEM950-POST-T4-REPOSITORY-WIDE-PROVIDER-SCAN each have PASS receipts.
